underlying_goal: Improve the analyzer frontend UI with collapsible config cards, optimize slow backend endpoints with caching, add pagination to backtest list, fix broken spinners, and add select functionality to backtest table
friction_detail: Initial caching optimization didn't help because the real bottleneck was JSON serialization (25s), not indicator computation; user had to tell Claude to test it.
brief_summary: User requested multiple analyzer UI improvements, backend performance optimization, and pagination; all were achieved after debugging a JSON serialization bottleneck, reducing request time from 17s to 2.5s.
